ability.en: For the first 2 minutes of each day, veteran players may not talk.
ability.es-419: Por los primeros 2 minutos de cada día, los jugadores experimentados no pueden hablar.
ability.sv: De 2 första minuterna varje dag får veteranspelare inte prata.
ability.zh-Hans: 每个白天的前两分钟老玩家不能发言。
ability.cn: 每个白天的前两分钟老玩家不能发言。

flavor_text.en: "You throw thorns. Falling in my silence, they become flowers."
flavor_text.es-419: Tú lanzas espinas. Caen en mi silencio, y se vuelven flores.
flavor_text.sv: Om du är tyst som en sönderslagen gonggong har du nått nirvana. Högmod finns inte hos dig.
flavor_text.zh-Hans: 人生在世如身处荆棘之中，心不动，人不妄动，不动则不伤。
flavor_text.cn: “人生在世如身处荆棘之中，心不动，人不妄动，不动则不伤。”

first_night.en: Announce which players are affected by the Buddhist.
first_night.es-419: Declara qué jugadores están afectados por el Budista.
first_night.sv: Meddela vilka spelare som påverkas av Buddisten.
first_night.zh-Hans: 宣布哪名玩家是佛教徒。

how_to_run.cn:
在游戏开始时，宣布佛教徒加入游戏。将佛教徒标记放入魔典中。在征得那些老玩家的同意后，宣布他们是佛教徒。佛教徒玩家在每个白天前两分钟都须保持安静。
你可以在任何时候宣布，并将佛教徒移出游戏。
如果你没有可用于计时的设备，那就由你来决定两分钟有多久，然后在你觉得合适的时候通知老玩家可以发言。
就像天使和革命者一样，佛教徒的能力在对玩家产生影响之前，最好要先征得玩家的同意。可以这样询问：“你是否介意在这个游戏中作为一名佛教徒？你非常擅长这个游戏，而现在我想让新手玩家有自我发挥的机会，可以吗？”
how_to_run.en:
At the start of the game, declare that the Buddhist is in play. Add the Buddhist token to the Grimoire. Declare which players are Buddhists, with their consent. Those players must stay silent for the first two minutes of each day.
Remove the Buddhist at any time, declaring when you do so.
If no device is available to set a two-minute timer, then use your best judgment as to what is two minutes, and inform the veterans when you feel that the time is up.


Like the Angel and the Revolutionary, you’ll want to ask for a player’s consent before affecting them with the Buddhist. Something like this is best: “Do you mind if I make you a Buddhist for this game? You are really good at the game, and I want to give the new players a chance to figure things out for themselves. Is that okay?”

cn: 小兰和小莱是老玩家，其他大部分玩家都是新玩家。为了鼓励新玩家说话，说书人让佛教徒加入游戏。小兰和小莱每一个白天的前两分钟都不能说话，两分钟后他们才可以自由地说话。
小文受到佛教徒的影响。他是一名爪牙并且在每个白天的前两分钟他只能聆听别人在说什么，同时也为他后来伪装成一名不在场的角色提供了方便。
en:
If no device is available to set a two-minute timer, then use your best judgment as to what is two minutes, and inform the veterans when you feel that the time is up.


Like the Angel and the Revolutionary, you’ll want to ask for a player’s consent before affecting them with the Buddhist. Something like this is best: “Do you mind if I make you a Buddhist for this game? You are really good at the game, and I want to give the new players a chance to figure things out for themselves. Is that okay?”

Lachlan and Lewis are veterans in a game of mostly new players. To encourage the new players to talk, the Storyteller puts the Buddhist in play. Lachlan and Lewis may not talk for the first two minutes each day, after which, they may talk freely.
Evin is affected by the Buddhist. He is a Minion and simply listens to what people are saying for the first two minutes, allowing him to bluff as a not-in-play character later on.
